title: Paniye Pani poove Lyrics Rajapattai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Javed Ali, Renu
Song: Panniye Panipoove
Music: Yuvan
Move: Rajapattai
Lyrics: Yugabharathi,

Paniye pani poovae, manam yeno parakudhe
Thalai kaal puriyaamal, unnai paarthu saami aadudhe
Uyire uyirt theeve, anal pole kodhikudhe
Veliye theriyaamal, unnai paarthu moochu vaangudhe..

Vedhaalam pole, nee velai seiyaadhe
Engengo thaavi, ennule aeraadhe

Kannu adikudhe, nenju nedikudhe
Raththam kothikudhe peipol kaadhal
Kathi tholikudhe, kannam sivakudhe
Sundi ezhukudhe noipoal kaadhal
Oh.. ..ho..... ..................(Paniye pani poovae...)

Kannae nee kaanum munnaal, Karam kallaaga vaazhdhene
Unpaarvai ennai theenda, idai kallaaga aanaene

Anbae nee pesum munnaal, Sema makkaana aal naanae
Un pechai Kaetap pinnaal, Pudhu book-aagip ponaene

Ènnai theriyaamal irundhene munbu naan
Èllam thelivaana oru yogi indru naan..
Unnai ninaiththaalae cell engum vinmeenthaan

Kannu adikudhe, nenju nedikudhe
Raththam kothikudhe peipol kaadhal
Kathi tholikudhe, kannam sivakudhe
Sundi ezhukudhe noipoal kaadhal
Oh.. ..ho..... ..................(Paniye pani poovae...)

Mulvelikulle vaadum, tamil-nilam pol aanaene
Anbe un Anbil naane, thani naadaagi povenae

Boomiku eerkum sakthi, athai yaar yaaro aaraaindhaargal
Anbae un eerpai sonnaen, palar appodhe saaidhaargal

Kangal yedharkaaga arivomae kaaranam
Kaigal yedharkaaga arivomae kaaranam
Ullam kalandhaalae adharku illai Kaaranam..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Paniye Pani Poove?

The song expresses feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional turmoil of the heart.

What is the plot context of Rajapattai related to this song?

This song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the film's emotional depth.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Javed Ali and Renu, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Paniye Pani Poove released?

The song was released on December 9, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paniye Pani Poove, the characters experience a whirlwind of emotions as they navigate their romantic feelings. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in Rajapattai. The collaboration between Javed Ali and Renu adds a unique charm, enhancing the song's romantic vibe. Overall, it beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paniye Pani Poove from the film Rajapattai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Javed Ali and Renu, paired with Yuvan's soulful composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of romance as the lyrics unfold a tale of deep emotions and connection.
stanzaMeanings: Oh flower of the rain, my heart seems to be flying. Without knowing the reason, I am dancing looking at you. My life is burning like a flame, but it also brings anger. Without revealing outside, I am taking in your sight.
Like a ghost, don't do your work. Somewhere far away, don't come into my heart.
My eyes are hurting, my heart is aching. Blood is boiling like love. The knife of love is hidden, my eyes are shining. The pain of love is rising.
Before I see you, I lived like a stone. Your sight made me feel alive, I became like this.
When you speak, my dear, I become a great person. After listening to your words, I became a new book.
I was here without knowing you, today I am a clear yogi. Thinking of you, my cell is shining everywhere.
My eyes are hurting, my heart is aching. Blood is boiling like love. The knife of love is hidden, my eyes are shining. The pain of love is rising.
In the depths of the earth, I am like the Tamil land. My love, I am going to become a unique land.
The earth has power, who has discovered it? My dear, I told you about it, many have accepted it.
Eyes are the reason for knowing, hands are the reason for knowing. When hearts unite, there is no reason for that.
